General.Name: Central Holding Group Co Ltd
General.Description: Central New Energy Holding Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the business of foundation, superstructure building, and other construction works in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It operates through New Energy and EPC; Green building and construction related business; Smart energy management services; Health and wellness; and F&B supply chain. The New Energy and EPC segment is involved in the manufacturing and sales of photovoltaic products and EPC. Its Green Building and Construction related business segment engages in the provision of piling works; excavation and lateral support works; and pile cap construction and building works; development and sale of properties and holding of properties for investment and leasing purposes; provision of property management services, which include security, cleaning, greening, gardening, repair and maintenance; and supplying of construction materials. The Smart Energy Management Services segment provides smart energy management system, which include sales and installation of energy-saving lighting, energy-saving equipment, and information technology development services. Its Health and Wellness segment offers health and wellness services, which include the healthcare consulting and sales of healthcare products, and healthy food. The F&B supply chain provides agriculture products, food and beverage materials supply chain business. The company was formerly known as Central Holding Group Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Central New Energy Holding Group Limited in May 2023. Central New Energy Holding Group Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in North Point, Hong Kong. Central New Energy Holding Group Limited is a subsidiary of Central Culture Resource Group Limited.
General.Address: K. Wah Centre, North Point, Hong Kong
